title: Bothan Combat Response Element
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Bothan Combat Response Element''' was a task force concept created by [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] tacticians during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], referred to good-humoredly as a "micro-fleet".

==History==
Originally established by one of the more adventurous [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[clan]]s, the Combat Response Element was intended to serve as local fast-attack squadron for use in skirmish warfare with nearby [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] holdouts, consisting largely of small [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] that had themselves been captured from the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. However, four years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kursk Mal'ia]]'s squadron was co-opted by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] for a long-range deployment to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], providing support for the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' on its mission into the remotest reaches of [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]].

For this mission, augmented by some New Republic ships, the Combat Response Element comprised eight capital ships. As well as Captain Mal'ia's flagship, the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|escort frigate]] ''[[Boash'ua]]'', there were two other reasonably large warships, the [[Assault Frigate Mark I|Assault Frigate]] ''[[Victory at Endor]]'' and the [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] ''[[Hutt's Ambition]]'' (perhaps outfitted as a carrier), plus the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Ast'ria]]'', and four [[DP20 gunship/Legends|Corellian gunships]], one of which was named [[Resistance (DP20 gunship)|''Resistance'']]. These ships were divided into a gunship line and a cruiser line, although the exact composition of the two groups is unclear. The unit's intervention at the [[Battle of Kathol System]] was essential to the destruction of [[DarkStryder]] and the defeat of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]'s forces.

[[Bem Lyu'kij]] was also a member of the Combat Response Element.

==Behind the scenes==
It is not completely clear from ''[[Endgame]]'' whether the Bothan Combat Response Element is a specific squadron within the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]], or if Captain Mal'ia's force is simply a representative of a more widespread Bothan "micro-fleet" concept known as a "Combat Response Element".

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Endgame (adventure)|book=Endgame|reprint=yes}}
